name: @ana/root
description: Agents & Arbiters: A multi-agent text adventure game
author: Guy Royse <guy@guy.dev>

scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run dev:web
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.build:web: cd web && npm run clean && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:api: cd api && npm run clean && npm install && npm run build
scripts.clean: npm run clean:api && npm run clean:web
scripts.install:all: npm run install:web && npm run install:api
